{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Watchman’s coat
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Watchman]]'s coat features seven nails hanging over the chest.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c15">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
